name: Shahi Korma
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs boned lamb or beef (cut into 1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the garlic, ginger, almonds, and 6 tablespoons water in a blender and blend until you have a paste.
2. Heat the oil in a wide, heavy pot or wok over medium-high heat. When hot, add meat pieces so they lie uncrowded in a single layer. Brown the meat pieces on all sides, then remove them with a slotted spoon and put them in a bowl.
3. Add cardamom, cloves, and cinnamon to the hot oil. Within seconds the cloves will expand. Stir in the onions and fry until brownish. Reduce heat to medium.
4. Stir in the paste from the blender along with coriander, cumin, and cayenne. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until it browns slightly.
5. Add meat cubes and any accumulated liquid from the meat bowl, salt, cream, and remaining water or broth (a bit more for beef). Bring to a boil.
6. Cover, turn heat to low, and simmer lamb for 1 hour and beef for 2 hours. Stir frequently during cooking and skim off any floating fat.
7. Sprinkle in garam masala and mix before serving.
